description_long: This object is a carved stone head, featuring a stylized human face with prominent brow ridges, a broad nose, and a slightly open mouth. The head is elongated, with intricate linear incisions on the scalp that suggest hair or a headdress, arranged in a geometric, almost herringbone pattern. The stone surface is dark gray with subtle variations in tone, and the texture appears weathered and rough, with some areas smoother from wear. The facial features are somewhat abstract, with deep-set eyes and a pronounced jawline, giving the object a striking, expressive quality. The back and sides of the head are less detailed, focusing mainly on the carved patterns atop the head. This artifact could serve as a decorative or symbolic barrier in an urban park or public space, evoking historical or cultural significance.
description: A weathered, carved stone head with stylized facial features and geometric incisions on the scalp, dark gray in color and rough in texture.
description_view_0: The front-left view highlights the facial features, including the nose, mouth, and deep-set eyes, as well as the incised patterns on the top of the head.
description_view_1: The left side view emphasizes the elongated shape of the head and the detailed linear carvings on the scalp, with the facial features partially visible.
description_view_2: The rear-left view focuses on the back of the head, showing the geometric incisions and the overall rounded form, with minimal facial detail visible.
description_view_3: The front-right view provides a clear look at the face and the patterned scalp, with the nose and mouth more prominent and the surface texture evident.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature on the ground
attribute_pattern: Geometric, linear incisions forming a herringbone or chevron pattern on the scalp, with irregular but intentional spacing.
attribute_weathering: Rough and weathered, with some smoother areas from handling or exposure, indicating moderate aging and outdoor exposure.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with modern urban materials but can serve as a focal point or cultural marker, often surrounded by paving stones or landscaping.
